register.title: Create a new account
register.errorRequired: Email, password, and first name are required.
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.successDescription: Save your secret key. You will need it if you ever need to recover your account. It will not be shown again.
register.secretKeySaveHint: Store this in a safe place. You will need this key if you forget your password.

home.allSettled: You are all settled up. No balances.

friends.title: Friends
friends.empty: No friends yet. Add a friend to get started.
friends.addTooltip: If the email is already registered, they'll be added directly. Otherwise, a placeholder account is created with the name you provide — they can register later with the same email.

expenses.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.

chat.title: Create with AI
chat.emptyState: Describe an expense to create. For example: "Split dinner $45 with John"

profile.title: Profile
profile.apiKeyDescription: Your API key is used for authentication. Rotating it will invalidate the current key.
profile.rotateConfirmDescription: This will invalidate your current API key and generate a new one. Any integrations using the old key will stop working.
profile.newKeyDescription: Save your new key. It will not be shown again.
